binary_metadata.file_type: a sh script, ASCII text executable

apt_metadata.depends: python3:any, python3-flask, python3-mcp, python3-requests, adduser, sudo
apt_metadata.recommends: nmap, gobuster, dirb, nikto, sqlmap, metasploit-framework, hydra, john, wpscan, enum4linux, wordlists
apt_metadata.description:
API bridge connecting MCP Clients to the API server
This package contains a lightweight API bridge that connects MCP Clients (e.g:
Claude Desktop, 5ire) to the API server which allows excuting commands on a
Linux terminal.
.
This allows the MCP to run terminal commands like nmap, nxc or any other tool,
interact with web applications using tools like curl, wget, gobuster. And
perform AI-assisted penetration testing, solving CTF web challenge in real
time, helping in solving machines from HTB or THM.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use kali-server-mcp because kali-server-mcp - Kali Linux MCP API Server.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair kali-server-mcp with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `kali-server-mcp --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
